author: Mechanism
text: Child bl-b0b9 (plugin-config split audit) complete -- verdict: interim split is structurally coherent for fresh post-bl-8a9a repos. Two follow-up bugs filed: bl-1d81 (bl plugin enable config_file unresolvable at runtime, pre-existing in bl-32e5) and bl-de57 (legacy repos with committed .balls/plugins/* not cleanly migrated; overlaps bl-dc2b). No project.json-ball contradiction. -- Mechanism
